inputs.label: Screen Diagonal
inputs.businessContext: Diagonal size of one screen in inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diagonal size of one screen in inches.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir ekranın inç cinsinden köşegen boyutu.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille diagonale d'un écran en pouces.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tamaño diagonal de una pantalla en pulgadas.

inputs.label: Aspect Width
inputs.businessContext: Width part of aspect ratio (e.g., 16 for 16:9).

businessContext_i18n.en: Width part of aspect ratio (e.g., 16 for 16:9).
businessContext_i18n.tr: En boy oranının genişlik kısmı (örneğin, 16:9 için 16).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Partie largeur du rapport d'aspect (ex. 16 pour 16:9).
businessContext_i18n.es: Parte ancha de la relación de aspecto (ej., 16 para 16:9).
businessContext_i18n.ar: جزء العرض من نسبة الأبعاد (مثل 16 لـ 16:9).

inputs.label: Aspect Height
inputs.businessContext: Height part of aspect ratio (e.g., 9 for 16:9).

businessContext_i18n.en: Height part of aspect ratio (e.g., 9 for 16:9).
businessContext_i18n.tr: En boy oranının yükseklik kısmı (örneğin, 16:9 için 9).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Partie hauteur du rapport d'aspect (ex. 9 pour 16:9).
businessContext_i18n.es: Parte alta de la relación de aspecto (ej., 9 para 16:9).
businessContext_i18n.ar: جزء الارتفاع من نسبة الأبعاد (مثل 9 لـ 16:9).

inputs.label: Number of Screens
inputs.businessContext: Number of screens in the quad setup.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of screens in the quad setup.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'écrans dans la configuration quadruple.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de pantallas en la configuración cuádruple.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir ekranın satın alma maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de compra por pantalla individual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة شراء كل شاشة على حدة.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO

rules.condition: screenDiagonal > 0 && aspectWidth > 0 && aspectHeight > 0 && numberOfScreens > 0 && costPerScreen >= 0 && bezelWidth >= 0 && mountingCost >= 0
rules.message: All inputs must be positive numbers.
